ui.screens package¶

ui.screens.main_window module¶

Start screen of the Personal Planner application.

This module defines the initial UI screen that allows users to navigate to the To-Do Lists and Vacation Planner sections.

class ui.screens.main_window.StartScreen(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: MDScreen

Main start screen of the application.

Displays the application title, logo, and navigation buttons for accessing the To-Do Lists and Vacation Planner screens.

go_to_todo(instance)[source]¶

Navigates to the To-Do Lists screen.

Parameters:

instance – Button instance that triggered the navigation

go_vacations(instance)[source]¶

Navigates to the Vacation Planner screen.

Parameters:

instance – Button instance that triggered the navigation

ui.screens.todo_ui module¶

To-Do List screen of the Personal Planner application.

This module defines the UI and logic for managing daily to-do tasks, including date selection, task creation, status updates, and navigation.

class ui.screens.todo_ui.TodoScreen(task_services, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: MDScreen

Screen for managing to-do tasks.

Allows users to select a date, view tasks for that day, add new tasks, and mark tasks as completed or in progress.

add_habit(*args)[source]¶

Handles adding a new habit from the dialog.

Calls TaskService to add the habit to the database, dismisses the dialog, and refreshes the habit table in the UI.

add_task(*args)[source]¶

Handles adding a new task from the dialog.

Calls TaskService to add the task to the database, dismisses the dialog, and refreshes the task list in the UI.

get_habit_color(habit, day_str)[source]¶
get_week_start(date_obj)[source]¶
go_back()[source]¶

Navigates back to the start screen.

mark_task_done(task_id, value)[source]¶

Updates task status via TaskService and refreshes UI.

Parameters:

  • task_id – ID of the task

  • value – True if task is completed

on_date_selected(instance, value, date_range)[source]¶

Handles the selected date from the date picker.

Parameters:

  • instance – Date picker instance

  • value – Selected date

  • date_range – Optional date range (unused)

refresh_habits()[source]¶

Refreshes the habits table for the selected week.

refresh_tasks()[source]¶

Refreshes the task list for the selected date.

Fetches tasks from TaskService and updates the display.

show_add_habit_dialog(*args)[source]¶

Displays a dialog for adding a new habit.

Requires a date to be selected before allowing habit creation.

show_add_task_dialog(*args)[source]¶

Displays a dialog for adding a new task.

Requires a date to be selected before allowing task creation.

show_date_picker(*args)[source]¶

Opens a date picker dialog.

Allows the user to select the day for which tasks will be displayed.

toggle_day_ui(habit_id, day_str, btn)[source]¶

Toggle habit log in DB și schimbă culoarea imediat.

ui.screens.vacation_details_ui module¶

Vacation detail screen of the Personal Planner application.

This module defines the UI and logic for displaying and managing daily itineraries within a selected vacation, including activities per day and time-based scheduling.

class ui.screens.vacation_details_ui.VacationDetailScreen(activities_services, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: MDScreen

Screen displaying detailed vacation itinerary.

Allows navigation between vacation days and management of daily activities, including time selection and notes.

add_activity(*args)[source]¶

Saves a new activity to the database and refreshes the current day view.

go_back()[source]¶

Navigates back to the vacations screen.

handle_delete_activity(activity_id, card)[source]¶
handle_edit_activity(activity)[source]¶
set_end_time(instance, value)[source]¶

Sets the selected end time.

Parameters:

value – Selected time

set_start_time(instance, value)[source]¶

Sets the selected start time.

Parameters:

value – Selected time

set_vacation(vacation)[source]¶

Sets the selected vacation and initializes day navigation.

Parameters:

vacation – Vacation object containing start/end dates

show_day_details(day)[source]¶

Displays activities for a specific vacation day.

Parameters:

day – Day number within the vacation

show_details_dialog(edit_mode=False, activity=None)[source]¶

Opens a dialog for adding a new activity.

show_end_time_picker(instance)[source]¶

Opens a time picker for selecting activity end time.

show_start_time_picker(instance)[source]¶

Opens a time picker for selecting activity start time.

update_activity(activity)[source]¶

ui.screens.vacation_ui module¶

Vacations screen of the Personal Planner application.

This module defines the UI and logic for managing vacations, including date selection, destination selection, and displaying saved vacation plans.

class ui.screens.vacation_ui.VacationsScreen(vacation_services, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: MDScreen

Screen for managing vacation plans.

Allows users to add new vacations by selecting dates and destinations and displays existing vacations as cards with images and details.

add_vacation(*args)[source]¶

Saves a new vacation to the database.

Validates that all required details are selected before persisting the vacation.

go_back()[source]¶

Navigates back to the start screen.

open_city_menu(country)[source]¶

Opens a dropdown menu for selecting a city.

Parameters:

country – Selected country

open_country_menu(instance)[source]¶

Opens a dropdown menu for selecting a country.

refresh_vacations()[source]¶

Refreshes the list of vacations displayed on screen.

Retrieves vacations from the database and displays them as cards with images and destination labels.

select_city(city)[source]¶

Stores the selected city and updates the UI.

Parameters:

city – Selected city name

select_country(country)[source]¶

Stores the selected country and opens the city menu.

Parameters:

country – Selected country name

set_end_date(instance, value, data_range)[source]¶

Sets the selected end date and validates it.

Ensures that the end date is after the start date.

set_start_date(instance, value, data_range)[source]¶

Sets the selected start date.

Parameters:

  • instance – Date picker instance

  • value – Selected start date

  • data_range – Optional date range (unused)

show_details_dialog(*args)[source]¶

Opens a dialog for entering vacation details.

The user can select start date, end date, and destination.

show_end_date_picker(*args)[source]¶

Opens a date picker for selecting the vacation end date.

show_start_date_picker(instance)[source]¶

Opens a date picker for selecting the vacation start date.

Personal Planner
